criterion_description: Five instruments are included with at least one ETF.
Five normal/non-shock days plus explicit trend and shock scenarios are present.
Five-level bid/ask prices, quantities and order counts are present.
Synthetic proof cadence is no finer than validated real evidence used for this stage.
acceptance_threshold: 5-minute synthetic book cadence is coarser than measured real tick cadence

criterion_description: Bid/ask prices align to each symbol tick grid.
Books have positive spreads and monotonic depth price ordering.
Proof is deterministic and storage is compact parquet/csv with manifest.
acceptance_threshold: row counts stable and manifest records inputs/outputs
